design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. Designed for speed, high data density, and clear workflows for insurance agents. Color is function only. Avoid decoration. Fast minimal-tap workflows are prioritized.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: The 'Control Room' Grid for dense admin/dashboard data and 'Mobile-First' for agent workflows.
layout_and_spacing.mobile_lists: Edge-to-edge list items with 1px bottom borders, high contrast data points, minimal padding for maximum screen utilization.
layout_and_spacing.desktop_dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-0 for border-collapse layouts).
layout_and_spacing.forms: Vertical stacks, 100% width inputs on mobile, multi-column on desktop. Minimal tap targets > 44px.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (`bg-white`), 1px subtle sharp border (`border-slate-200`), NO SHADOWS. Sharp or max 4px radius (`rounded-sm`).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.grid_borders: Use the technical look for heavy data sections. Expose the skeleton with `border-collapse` layouts and `border-r border-b border-slate-200` on items.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Solid white background (`bg-white`) with a hard 1px bottom border (`border-b border-slate-200`). Sticky top with `z-50`.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.modals_drawers: Mobile: Bottom sheets (`Drawer` component). Desktop: Centered Dialogs (`Dialog` component). Solid background, 1px border.

components_strategy.buttons: Square or rounded-sm, high contrast. Primary actions are solid blue. Secondary actions are white with 1px border. Hover states must change background and explicitly set text color.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn standard. Square or rounded-sm (`rounded-sm`), 1px border. Focus state must have high contrast ring (`focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-700`).
components_strategy.lists_and_tables: Data density is key. Use Shadcn Table for desktop. For mobile, use custom mapped `<div className="flex flex-col border-b border-slate-200 py-3">` items.
components_strategy.toasts: Sonner, positioned bottom-center on mobile, bottom-right on desktop.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use bold or regular weights for clarity in dense dashboards. Use minimal icons—only where they speed up recognition (e.g., Call, WhatsApp, Filter).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against background. Badges and tags must have high-contrast text.
accessibility.interactive_states: All buttons, links, and list items must have distinct hover, focus, and active states.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-btn"`).

views_and_workflows.1_authentication: Minimalist login screen. White background, simple centered form. High contrast PIN input.
views_and_workflows.2_dashboard: Grid-based control room. High-level metrics for Leads, Claims, Finances. Quick action floating button on mobile.
views_and_workflows.3_lead_management: Dense, searchable list on mobile. Color-coded status dots. Swipe or tap to reveal Call/WhatsApp quick actions. Deep link to `wa.me` for WhatsApp.
views_and_workflows.4_lead_detail_post_call: Focused view. Prominent 'Log Call' button leading to a quick form. Status update dropdown.
views_and_workflows.5_quotation_system: Multi-step form or long scrolling form. High contrast sections for Vehicle Details, Coverage, Premium.
views_and_workflows.6_data_grids: (Claims, RTO, Fitness, Finance Ledger, HR, Loans, CRM) - Use consistent list patterns on mobile and dense data tables on desktop. Sticky headers.

abstract_backgrounds.description: Subtle white geometric background for the login screen.

avatars.description: Professional headshot for HR/Employee list mockups.
Professional headshot for HR/Employee list mockups.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Build mobile-first. Rely heavily on dense, edge-to-edge lists for data on mobile. 2. Install `@phosphor-icons/react` and `sonner`. 3. Do not use 'Card' components with heavy shadows or rounded corners. Keep it flat, sharp, and high contrast. 4. Use `Chivo` for headings and `IBM Plex Sans` for body text. Update Tailwind config accordingly. 5. Include `data-testid` on all buttons and inputs. 6. WhatsApp integration should use `wa.me/` links. 7. Do not use generic fallback images; use the avatars provided for user lists.
